creator: slasiewski@lbl.gov
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/security/notices.html lists two new errata:

Date	Errata Notice name
2015-05-25	FreeBSD-EN-15:05.ufs
2015-05-25	FreeBSD-EN-15:04.freebsd-update


The date says "2015-05-25" when this errata was actually announced "2015-05-13". Today is May 14.
